channel.title: Posts on Veblenia
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Veblenia

item.title: Hugo Blog Posts
item.description:
Proem

:PROPERTIES :EXPORT_FILE_NAME: 2026-04-02-proem :END

I will be honest here: I set up this blog because I was curious about how to set up a static blog using GitHub as a host. This came to fruition out of some technical desire. Beyond that, there is no plan going forward.

The name Veblenia is derived from Veblenian, i.e. someone who adheres, in whole or in part, to the institutional economics of Thorstein Veblen. It has been claimed by some I made a typo when registering the domain. That is false. That is slander.
